Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve.
Question: The product of two consecutive odd numbers is 399. Find the numbers.
Answer: The numbers are $$-21$$ and $$-19$$ or 19 and 21.

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve.
Question: The area of a rectangular shaped patio 432 square feet. The length of the patio is 6 feet more than its width. Find the length and width.

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve.
Question: A ladder leans against the wall of a building. The length of the ladder is 9 feet longer than the distance of the bottom of the ladder from the building. The distance of the top of the ladder reaches up the side of the building is 7 feet longer than the distance of the bottom of the ladder from the building. Find the lengths of all three sides of the triangle formed by the ladder leaning against the building.

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve.
Question: Shruti is going to throw a ball from the top of a cliff. When she throws the ball from 80 feet above the ground, the function $$h ( t ) = -16 t^{2} + 64 t + 80$$ models the height, h , of the ball above the ground as a function of time, t . Find: ⓐ the zeros of this function which tells us when the ball will hit the ground. ⓑ the time(s) the ball will be 80 feet above the ground. ⓒ the height the ball will be at $$t = 2$$ seconds which is when the ball will be at its highest point.
